observation: I can see the Specter.AI homepage with a Sign Up button highlighted in the top right corner. There are also some other buttons like 'Create Account' and 'Get Started' visible on the page. I need to start the sign-up process by clicking the main Sign Up button.
reasoning: As a normal user looking to sign up for the first time, I should click the prominent 'Sign Up' button that's clearly visible at the top of the page to begin the registration process.

dual_diagnosis.visual_observation: Sign Up button changed from outlined style to solid blue background, but no sign-up flow progression occurred. A red circular element with white center appeared in the middle-right area of the screen, which appears to be an error indicator or loading state that failed.
dual_diagnosis.diagnosis: The Sign Up button visual state changed indicating it was tapped, but the expected sign-up flow (form, modal, or page navigation) did not initiate. The red circular element suggests an error occurred during the action processing.
